name: David Traylor
bio: David Traylor serves as the Rains County Sheriff, protecting the residents of one of the smaller counties in East Texas from the county seat of Emory. Sheriff Traylor provides full-service law enforcement including patrol and detention for the Lake Fork and Lake Tawakoni communities.
campaignPromises: Ensure public safety around Lake Fork and Lake Tawakoni
Maintain rapid response times despite the small department size
Protect fishing tournament visitors and seasonal residents
Keep Rains County drug free through proactive enforcement
Run an efficient and fiscally responsible sheriff's office
